languages.text:
{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defense{/g} now has 3 charges, each successful Block spends 1 charge.
{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defense{/g} remains intact as long as it has charges or until the start of wielder's next turn.
Wielder's {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defense{/g} counter-attacks have +25% Critical Hit Chance

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defense{/g} now has 3 charges, each successful Block spends 1 charge.
{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defense{/g} remains intact as long as it has charges or until the start of wielder's next turn.
Wielder's {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defense{/g} counter-attacks have +25% Critical Hit Chance

languages.text:
When the wearer uses {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defence{/g}, they gain +3 stacks of this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}. When the wearer blocks an attack by the marked enemy, −1 stack is spent. The bonus to block remains the same and lasts while the wearer has at least one {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Stalwart Defence{/g} stack.
The wearer's counter-attacks triggered by this ability gain +25% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.

languages.text:
Takan kişi, {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Dört Yandan Savunma{/g} kullandığında bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetten{/g} +3 adet birikim kazanır. Takan kişi, işaretli düşmanın saldırısını blokladığında 1 birikim harcanır. Blok değerine gelen bonus, aynı kalır ve takan kişinin en az bir {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Dört Yandan Savunma{/g} birikimi kalana dek sürer.
Bu kabiliyetin tetiklediği, takan kişinin karşı saldırıları +%25 kritik vuruş olasılığı kazanır.
languages.original_text:
When the wearer uses {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}All-Around Defence{/g}, they gain +3 stacks of this ability. When the wearer blocks an attack by the marked enemy, −1 stack is spent. The bonus to block remains the same and lasts while the wearer has at least one {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}All-Around Defence{/g} stack.
The wearer's counter-attacks triggered by this ability gain +25% critical hit chance.

languages.text:
Cuando el portador usa {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Defensa completa{/g}, gana +3 acumulaciones de esta capacidad. Cuando el portador bloquea un ataque del enemigo marcado, se gasta −1 acumulación menos. La bonificación al bloqueo no cambia y dura mientras al portador le quede por lo menos una acumulación de {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Defensa completa{/g}.
Los contraataques del portador activados por esta capacidad ganan un +25 % de probabilidad de impacto crítico.

The bonus to block remains the same and lasts while the wearer has at least one {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}All-Around Defence{/g} stack.
The wearer's counter-attacks triggered by this ability gain +25% critical hit chance.

languages.text:
当装备者使用{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}全面防御{/g}时，获得3层此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}效果层数。每当被标记的敌人攻击装备者，被装备者格挡时，此能力层数都会减少1层。只要装备者至少拥有1层{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}全面防御{/g}能力效果层数，此能力带来的格挡加值就始终保持不变。
当装备者受到此能力影响，进行反击时，反击的{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击率{/g}提高25%。

languages.text:
Setzt der Träger {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Rundumverteidigung{/g} ein, erhält er +3 Stapel dieser {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g}. Blockiert der Träger einen Angriff des markierten Gegners, wird -1 Stapel verbraucht. Der Blocken-Bonus bleibt gleich und hält an, solange der Träger mindestens einen Stapel {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Rundumverteidigung{/g} hat.
Die durch diese Fähigkeit ausgelösten Gegenangriffe des Trägers haben +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}Kritische Trefferchance{/g}.

languages.text:
Chaque fois que le porteur utilise {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Omnidéfense{/g}, il gagne +3 cumuls de cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g}. Chaque fois que le porteur bloque une attaque infligée par l'ennemi marqué, -1 cumul est dépensé. Le bonus au blocage dure tant que le porteur est sous l'effet d'au moins 1 cumul d'{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Omnidéfense{/g}.
Les contre-attaques du porteur déclenchées par cette capacité gagnent +25 % aux {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}chances de coup critique{/g}.

Les contre-attaques du porteur déclenchées par cette capacité gagnent +25 % aux chances de coup critique.

languages.text:
使用者が{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}オールラウンドディフェンス{/g}を使用する場合、このアビリティのスタックが+3される。使用者がマークしていた敵の攻撃をブロックすると、スタックが-1される。使用者が少なくとも1つ以上の{g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}オールラウンドディフェンス{/g}スタックを有している間、ブロックボーナスは同じまま持続する。
このアビリティによって発生する使用者の反撃はクリティカルヒット率が+25%される。

When the wearer uses {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}All-Around Defence{/g}, they gain +3 stacks of this ability. When the wearer blocks an attack by the marked enemy, −1 stack is spent. The bonus to block remains the same and lasts while the wearer has at least one {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}All-Around Defence{/g} stack.

languages.text:
При применении {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Стойкой обороны{/g} персонаж получает 3 уровня эффекта этой способности. Заблокировав атаку от отмеченного врага, он тратит 1 уровень. Бонус к блоку остается таким же, как и в обычной версии способности, и длится, пока у персонажа есть хотя бы один уровень {g|f:f6a60b4556214528b0ce295c4f69306e}Стойкой обороны{/g}.
Контратаки персонажа в рамках этой способности получают +25% к шансу критического попадания.
